name: Decorative Plastic Lid White - Brightroom™: Modern Storage Bin Lid for 13" Cube System, Cut-Out Handles, Polypropylene
description:
Keep your space organized and clutter out of sight with this Decorative Plastic Lid from Brightroom™. The white decorative lid is made of BPA-free plastic material, and is perfectly sized to fit storage bins for storage on a shelf or in a closet. Plus, side cutout handles make for easy carrying from room to room.


Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
